design-system-button.name: Button
design-system-button.description:
Design-system Button. Consumes semantic tokens only; platform divergence
(radius, height, motion) arrives via [data-platform] CSS overrides.
Variants map to the locked direction (DDR-002):
 - primary: blue, the default flow action
 - accent: amber, ONE conversion moment per journey (DDR-002 scarcity rule)
 - secondary: tinted, equal-citizenship alternatives (e.g. consent Decline)

(radius, height, motion) arrives via [data-platform] CSS overrides.
Variants map to the locked direction (DDR-002):

stories.name: Accent
stories.description: Amber is reserved for ONE conversion moment per journey (DDR-002).

stories.name: Secondary
stories.description: Equal-citizenship alternative action — e.g. Decline on the consent screen.

stories.name: Disabled
stories.description: Wizard CTAs disable until the step is valid (never hidden).

stories.name: Loading
stories.description: Async money actions show inline progress — no optimistic UI.
